[00:00:00.00] Right now we are dialing Shannon.
[00:00:03.40] Hi there.
[00:00:07.00] Hi I'm here with your reindeer hot dog.
[00:00:18.00] Okay cool.
[00:00:20.00] Yeah.
[00:00:21.00] Alright I'm gonna go around the corner.
[00:00:25.00] Alright don't get shot.
[00:00:29.00] Leave the car going.
[00:00:31.00] Alright.
[00:00:32.00] Yeah yeah yeah.
[00:00:35.00] Down to the car.
[00:00:40.00] Yeah.
[00:00:42.00] Oh yeah.
[00:00:45.00] Yeah yeah.
[00:00:48.00] Oh.
[00:00:51.00] Check out this bruise.
[00:00:54.00] Can you see it?
[00:00:57.00] Yeah.
